CustomField.description: shows the reason for the quote status being invalid
CustomField.formula: IF(AND( NATT_Original_Number_of_Locked_Lines__c = 0, Number_of_Locked_Lines__c > 0, ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Type__c, "Amendment")), "This amendment quote is invalid because the group of orders has now become partially locked. You must create a new amendment quote to change your order." & BR(),"") & IF(AND( NATT_Num_of_Ordered_Base_Units_In_Quote__c <> NATT_Number_of_Ordered_Base_Units__c, ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__Type__c, "Amendment")),"This amendment quote is invalid and outdated because a more recent amendment quote has been converted to an order. You must create a new amendment quote to change your order.","")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If the quote is invalid this will show the reason.
CustomField.label: Quote Status Reason
